name: Stored Credentials from Windows
notes: This rule detects stored credentials from Windows.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Exploit.Command Execution, Audit.Command Execution Success
when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%vaultcmd /listcreds:"windows credentials"%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Stored Credentials from Windows on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Exploit.Command Execution, Audit.Command Execution Success
AND when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%vaultcmd /listcreds:"windows credentials"%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Stored Credentials from Windows
Event description: Detects stored credentials from Windows.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using ProcessName (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
